title: Surgeon Vacancy at Care Hospitals - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Care Hospitals - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Care Hospitals has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Care Hospitals:
Care Hospitals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Hospitals!
